---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# InstrumentQC

- Inherent in this approach to signature comparsion, is assumption spectral cytometers are stably maintaining to QC target values over time. 

- Leveraged before and after acquired .fcs files of the QC beads, building dashboard showcasing levey-jennings plots for all the instruments at our core. Automated to process every day, and render to sharable website. 

-
